name: @cnsofts/mcp
description: MCP server that lets a coding agent (e.g. Claude Code) drive CloudNSofts boards & discussions

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=../agent-workspace/server/index.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);"
